ops.body: P3 closed at daemonkit v0.1.0 (a5ed2e3). Drain engine hardened over eight adversarial rounds (5 refuter workflows, ~28 verdicts dispositioned): root-lock architecture, incarnation-bound handles, scoped truncate with one shared seq-advancement rule, launch-site strike accounting, boot-session identity. Consumer contracts (idempotent Yield, exclusive fence, gated spawn) are load-bearing godoc — Track F gate checklist: daemonkit doc 67f6e62.
